summary: Iteration 14 — Flight Number mandatory for Airport Transfer + Cancellation Policy (3 placements) + expanded SEO. Backend: 12/12 pytest pass (1.48s). Frontend: 11/11 dynamic UI tests pass — flight-number/meet-greet show/hide on service type, cancellation chip toggle, airport-only flight-delay block, body bullets. Static SEO: confirmed 26 areaServed (23 cities + 3 Place SFO/OAK/SJC), 6 FAQ Q&A including Meet & Greet + Cancellation Policy, expanded keywords (palo alto limo, silicon valley chauffeur, napa wine tour limo, flight tracking limo, meet and greet sfo all present). NOTE: Frontend needed `supervisorctl restart frontend` to serve the updated public/index.html — CRA dev-server cached the old version. All iteration-14 acceptance criteria pass.
action_items: Optional: Main agent may verify ManageBooking page (/manage/:token) end-to-end by creating booking + admin-confirming via 2FA bypass — covered indirectly by backend test_manage_endpoint_404_for_invalid_token; CancellationPolicy `full` variant code is correct (variant='full' forces open=true on mount, body always visible).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py still ~2000+ lines — splitting into routers is overdue (carried from iter 13).
BookingCreate validates flight_number with `(payload.flight_number or '').strip()` — empty/whitespace correctly rejected (verified). Good defensive check.
render_cancellation_policy_html is_airport flag derived from booking.get('service_type') == 'Airport Transfer' — correct.
CancellationPolicy.jsx: button is `disabled={variant === 'full'}` which is good a11y, but combined with `cursor-pointer hover:bg-white/[0.02]` only on compact — clean.

index.html change requires a frontend restart to be picked up by webpack-dev-server — flag this for deploy: production CRA build will include the change automatically, but in preview the dev server needed a restart.
seed_data_creation: Created 3 TEST_Iter14 bookings during POST /api/bookings validation tests (Airport Transfer w/ UA1234, Airport Transfer w/ aa1234, Wedding). They remain in db.bookings with TEST_ prefix — main agent / admin can purge if needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 complete. flight_number is now backend-enforced for Airport Transfer (400 + 'flight number' in detail). Conditional UI logic verified: Airport Transfer reveals booking-flight-number + meet-greet-toggle; Wedding hides both. cancellation-policy chip + body work; airport flight-delay section conditionally renders only for Airport Transfer. Confirmation email render includes flight_number line + airport policy block. SEO: index.html keywords/FAQPage/areaServed expanded as specified. IMPORTANT for future: if /index.html changes don't appear in browser, restart frontend supervisor — dev server caches it.
rca_of_the_issue: Initial /index.html static SEO checks returned stale content via curl because CRA's webpack-dev-server had cached the previous public/index.html. Resolution: `sudo supervisorctl restart frontend`. After restart, all SEO assertions pass (23 cities + 3 places = 26 areaServed entries, 6 FAQ Q&A, expanded keywords including palo alto limo / silicon valley chauffeur / napa wine tour limo / flight tracking limo / meet and greet sfo).
